O0400C3_PT_GRP_MIN_NUM O0400C3 Physical Therapy Group Minutes Number CHAR 4 The data in this column indicates the total number of minutes that physical therapy was administered to the resident as part of a group of residents in the last seven days. discontinued 09/30/2025
